fields.name: Budget Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the budget that the analysis view budget entries are linked to.

fields.name: Business Unit Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the business unit that the analysis view is based on.

fields.name: G/L Account No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the account that the entry has been posted to.

fields.name: Dimension 1 Value Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the dimension value you selected for the analysis view dimension that you defined as Dimension 1 on the analysis view card.

fields.name: Dimension 2 Value Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the dimension value you selected for the analysis view dimension that you defined as Dimension 2 on the analysis view card.

fields.name: Dimension 3 Value Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the dimension value you selected for the analysis view dimension that you defined as Dimension 3 on the analysis view card.

fields.name: Dimension 4 Value Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the dimension value you selected for the analysis view dimension that you defined as Dimension 4 on the analysis view card.

fields.name: Entry No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the general ledger budget entry number for the analysis view budget entry.
The contents of this field cannot be changed.

fields.name: Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount of the analysis view budget entry.
